articles.title: PM warns Burnham against immediate leadership challenge if he wins by-election
articles.description: Keir Starmer says Labour should focus on a subsequent Manchester mayoral race if Andy Burnham wins in Makerfield.

articles.title: Inflation unexpectedly steady as food price rises slow
articles.description: Higher petrol prices were offset by slower price rises for meat, dairy and vegetables, according to the ONS.

articles.title: British couple describe having warning shots fired near them by Russian warship
